title: Homemade Norwegian Flatbread
description: A delicious and authentic Norwegian flatbread recipe made with simple ingredients. Best served with cheese, meats, or as a side.
instructions: Combine flour, yeast, and salt in a large mixing bowl.
Gradually add water and mix until a dough forms.
Knead dough for 10 minutes until smooth.
Place dough in a greased bowl, cover, and let rise for 1 hour.
Punch down dough and roll out to 1/4 inch thickness.
Place dough on a baking sheet and bake for 15-20 minutes.
Brush with dense dough for a crispy crust (optional).
